claim: Encoder-only and encoder-decoder models generalize better than decoder-only on causal reasoning tasks, especially under distributional shift.
quote: Encoders expose every token to the full relational field, enabling the model to encode logical dependencies as a smooth, curvature-preserving flow. Decoder-only architectures... accumulate local noise that disrupts higher-order invariants.
causal_mechanism: Bidirectional contextualization at representation time vs autoregressive token-by-token noise accumulation

claim: Attention head intervention provides causal (not merely correlational) evidence of transformer computation circuits.
source: arXiv:2601.04398v4 - Interpreting Transformers Through Attention Head Intervention
quote: Mechanistic interpretability makes causal claims. Attention head intervention achieves this by actively manipulating individual attention heads to establish which causally drive behaviour.
causal_mechanism: Direct intervention vs passive correlation observation; paradigm shift in interpretability methodology

claim: Encoder representations from marked regions in medical imaging can be causally traced through decoder cross-attention layers to downstream text generation.
source: ScienceDirect:S2950363925000377 - Mechanistic interpretability in medical report generation
quote: Encoder representations from marked regions in the chest X-ray can be causally traced through decoder cross-attention layers to downstream...
causal_mechanism: Cross-attention gradient flow preserves spatial-semantic attribution chain

claim: Topological features (contact maps, persistent homology) at 256 dimensions outperform ESM-2-only at 2560 dimensions for antibody-antigen binding prediction.
quote: ESM2-only (LASSO) achieves a lower R^2 of 0.2896, confirming the benefit of incorporating geometric and topological priors.
causal_mechanism: Topological features capture interface geometry and persistent homology; semantic embeddings miss structural invariants

claim: Performance degradation occurs at ESM-2 with 3B parameters vs 650M, disconfirming the assumption that larger semantic models always improve.
source: eLife:98033 - Semantical and Geometrical Protein Encoding
quote: A performance degradation is observed at ESM2 with 3 billion parameters. A higher dimension and richer semantic expression do not always yield better performance.
causal_mechanism: Over-parameterized semantic space introduces noise; topology provides a compact, discriminative representation

claim: Node2Vec topological embeddings provide spatially contextual amino acid representations that enhance downstream protein function prediction with reduced memory.
source: PMC12391975 - ESM-2 and GNN with AlphaFold-2
quote: Node2Vec algorithm applied to residue-level protein graph obtains informative and spatially contextual embeddings... compact and discriminative feature representation.
causal_mechanism: Graph random walk captures relational topology; precomputing embeddings decouples structural encoding from model training

claim: Radar measurement uncertainty is inherently crescent-shaped (anisotropic) in Cartesian space, approximated by ellipsoidal anisotropic Gaussian via first-order error propagation.
source: arXiv:2603.01026v1 - RaUF: Spatial Uncertainty Field for Radar
quote: Crescent-shaped uncertainty in radar measurements can be approximated by ellipsoid-shaped confidence with an anisotropic Gaussian distribution... parameterize uncertainty in polar coordinates, predicting radial uncertainty σ_t and angular uncertainty σ_a separately.
causal_mechanism: Polar coordinate radar physics produces asymmetric variance; Cartesian projection non-linearly maps this into crescent geometry

claim: Bidirectional Domain Attention (BDA) reduces false positives by fusing Doppler coherence with spatial structure to suppress spurious multipath scatters.
quote: BDA module for Doppler radar reinforces spatial features with Doppler information, thereby reducing false positives with a physically grounded mechanism. Uncertainty calibration reduces CD by 30.55%-37.18% and improves F-score by 27.27%-38.71%.
causal_mechanism: Doppler velocity provides orthogonal signal to spatial geometry; cross-modal attention gates ghost-point suppression

claim: Synchronization-gated Hebbian plasticity (HOC-L) creates a two-timescale dynamical system where phase coherence r(t) gates structural weight updates, proven convergent via composite Lyapunov function.
quote: Connectivity consolidation occurs only when sufficient phase coherence signals a meaningful computational pattern. We prove convergence of the joint system to a stable equilibrium via a composite Lyapunov function.
causal_mechanism: Macroscopic order parameter r(t) from Kuramoto model gates Hebbian updates; fast oscillations select computationally relevant patterns before structural consolidation

claim: Kuramoto associative memory achieves exponential capacity growth with network size via stable phase-locked configurations mapped to binary patterns.
source: arXiv:2504.03102 - Oscillatory Associative Memory with Exponential Capacity
quote: Capacity of our associative memory network increases exponentially with network size... a pattern can be stored and retrieved flawlessly if its phase configuration forms a stable phase-locked state.
causal_mechanism: Phase-locked equilibria as memory attractors; Hebbian coupling weights encode pattern associations in oscillator network

claim: The CIB objective L_CIB = I(X;Z) - μ·I(Y;Z|X) functions as a high-pass semantic filter, excising predictable filler while preserving high-entropy CoT peaks.
source: arXiv:2603.08462v1 - Unifying Budget Forcing via CIB
quote: By penalizing cumulative low-utility transitions, the objective functions as a high-pass semantic filter, excising the predictable filler while preserving the high-entropy peaks. This confirms CIB achieves compression not by random truncation, but by maximizing the average information rate.
causal_mechanism: Semantic surprisal quantifies token utility; IB rate-distortion tradeoff applied to reasoning trace as communication channel

claim: Naive IB application to transformers fails because attention violates the Markov property between prompt, reasoning trace, and response.
quote: Attention violates the Markov property between prompt, reasoning trace, and response. Its Lagrangian dual is precisely the Conditional Information Bottleneck (CIB) problem.
causal_mechanism: Self-attention creates non-Markovian long-range dependencies; CIB explicitly conditions on prompt to handle this

claim: Sequential chain depth exceeding 5 nodes without ContextLock intervention causes catastrophic L2 norm entity density drop (33-52%) due to Lost-in-the-Middle attention bias.
source: file:1 - Cross-Domain Autonomy Pattern Extraction (SCOS Research)
quote: This degradation becomes catastrophic when the sequential chain depth exceeds [5] nodes without an intervening ContextLock decorator. L2 norm entity density drop 41.2-52.1% across domain intersections.
causal_mechanism: Self-attention weight normalization across long sequences mathematically suppresses mid-sequence tokens; dominant attention sinks absorb probability mass

claim: High-throughput laser shock systems (vision-guided closed-loop control) enable automated cyber-physical hypothesis validation via see-move-shoot experimental cycles.
quote: System employs automated linear stages to sequentially manipulate material specimens under laser for impact testing. Each experiment includes automatic target detection, sample centering, laser activation, impact verification.
causal_mechanism: CNN-based flyer detection (EfficientNetB0) closes the loop between hypothesis generation and physical material testing
